name_en: Chanel 24A Doctor Bag Large In Stock
name_cn:
Chanel 24A Doctor Bag Large In Stock
The most beautiful of the season! It really has to be the Haute Couture series~ The oil wax lambskin has a great texture, and even the opening method is so retro and fun 😜 The exquisite retro court-style shape is eye-catching, and it's a perfect finishing touch when worn.
Large: 16×23.5×8cm
Model: AS4959
